content.subject: Unsatisfactory service
content.body: I'm writing to complain about the unsatisfactory service I received at your store. Two weeks ago, I purchased a newly launched model of washing machine. But I found when I unpacked it that it had been damaged on the right side of the door. Also, when I was doing my laundry it automatically stopped and I couldn't get it to start again. So, I tried to call the repair center over 5 times, but I still haven't received any repair service. I think this is not a good way to treat customers. Please write back soon and let's discuss this matter.
content.instruction: Respond to the e-mail as if you are a worker at White Appliances. In your e-mail, give at least ONE explanation and make TWO compensations.

content.subject: It's time to travel!!!
content.body: We do Australia because we know Australia. Now it's time to talk to the Australia specialist and book your Christmas and New Year's holidays. Also, we're offering special deals to Sydney, Melbourne, and many more tourist attractions in Australia. Call 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Please visit our Web site www.kangaroo.co.au. We hope to hear from you soon!
content.instruction: Respond to the e-mail as if you are a customer. In your e-mail, ask TWO questions about the travel packages and make ONE request.

content.prompt: When it comes to workplace, we normally think we have to go there to work. A lot of us commute to work every day. However, there are some people who work remotely at their homes or away from their offices. What do you think is the reason why some companies permit their employees to work this way?

content.subject: Annual Company Picnic
content.body:
Dear Team,

We are planning the annual company picnic for next month. Please let us know your preferred date (June 15 or June 22), any dietary restrictions, and whether you will bring family members.
content.instruction: Respond to the email. In your response, answer ALL of the questions asked.

content.prompt:
Do you agree or disagree with the following statement?

"Technology has made people's lives more complicated rather than simpler."

Support your opinion with reasons and examples.

vocab.example: Please inform us of any dietary restrictions.

vocab.definition: (adj.) consisting of many connected parts; complex
vocab.example: The instructions were too complicated to follow.
There are no restrictions on the number of guests.

structures.example:
I would like to attend the company picnic.
I would like to suggest June 22 as the date.

The hotel has a pool. In addition, there is a gym.
The product is affordable. Furthermore, it is high quality.
